title: Liquid Banking on Hyperliquid with Hyperbeat
summary_title: Liquid Banking and the HyperBeat Super App: Non-Custodial Finance
summary_description: 800 from HyperBeat explains how to trade, spend, and borrow against crypto assets in one account without giving up custody.

key_moments.label: Introduction to 800 and HyperBeat co-founder background
Origins of HyperBeat: from testnet validators to liquid banking focus
What is liquid banking: unified account for trading, spending, credit entirely non-custodial
On-ramp and off-ramp problem: why HyperBeat built multi-currency solutions
Product walkthrough: signup, smart accounts, spending on credit, sweep-to-card feature
Multiple currency support and forex fees: HyperBeat's low-cost approach
Incentives: HLP cashback and treasury-yield-based referral programs
HIP3, HIP4, and future: spot assets, prediction markets, and ecosystem growth
